name: GOLFTEC Tucson
about: GOLFTEC Tucson is a high-tech golf training facility focused on personalized coaching and club fitting. Their instruction utilizes advanced technology including OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide data-driven feedback. Lessons and practice sessions are guided by certified PGA coaches who create personalized game plans for improvement. The facility also offers custom club fitting services using advanced launch monitors and shaft optimization to match golfers with the best equipment from major brands.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using launch monitors and OPTIMOTION technology
Personalized coaching plans with certified PGA professionals
Advanced club fitting with launch monitors and shaft optimization

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors used for instruction and club fitting

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides clubs for lessons and fittings. They also offer custom club fitting services where you can purchase new clubs fitted to your swing.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of on-site food or drink service, and BYOB policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC's indoor sessions are not structured as traditional 18-hole rounds but as focused practice or lessons, so typical time estimates do not apply.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The content does not specifically mention youth programs or kid-friendly amenities. Contact the location directly for information on junior golf programs.
